title: Sculpted Gallery Frame
description: A production-grade sculpted frame system with an exact multi-lobe 92-sample rail profile, orientation-specific miter-like sweeps, coupled artwork depth, distinct walnut/gold/ebony texture bundles, gallery wall and floor surfaces, warm grazing spotlights, static VSM shadows, ACES exposure, and selective bloom restoration.
techniques: authored walnut, antique-gold, and ebony PBR identities
selective bloom material substitution and restoration
